description: Camera zooms from world view into a specific city, then a pin drops with a bounce. Info card slides in with two stats. Best for spotlighting a single location — incident site, city profile, target location.

fields.MAP_LABEL_1: City key AND display name (uppercase): LOS_ANGELES, NEW_YORK, LONDON, PARIS, DUBAI, TOKYO, BEIJING, MOSCOW, SYDNEY, WASHINGTON_DC, KYIV, TEHRAN, GAZA, SINGAPORE, CAIRO
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Supporting detail shown on the info card, e.g. 'Headquarters of the central bank targeted in the breach'
